welcome.title: Nnọọ na AjoLedger
welcome.body: Anyị na melite nchekwa obodo site na ịkpughe ihe, ntụkwasị obi, na mfe, ka e nwee ike chebe omenala Ajo ị maara.

recorded.title: Ịkwụ Ụgwọ ọ Bụla. A Na-edekọ Ya Akpakaonwe.
recorded.body: Enweghị spreadsheets ma ọ bụ receipts. A na-edekọ ntinye ego ọ bụla akpakaonwe, ka ị hụ ọnọdụ nchekwa gị n'oge ọ bụla.

confidence.title: Soro Nchekwa Gị N'obi Ike.
confidence.body: Mata ọnọdụ ntinye gị, ụgwọ na-abịa, na ọganihu nchekwa gị na dashboard dị mfe ma mepụtara maka onye ọ bụla.

auth.forgetPasscodeBody: A ga-apụ gị ma ị ga-abanye site na email na paswọọd gị iji seta koodu nnweta ọhụrụ.

errors.passcodeLockedOut: Ọtụtụ mbọ nke ọma. Nwaa ọzọ n'ime {{seconds}} sekọnd.
errors.pinMismatch: PINs adịghị eme otu. Biko nwaa ọzọ.
errors.googleNotConfigured: Agbanye Google adịghị arụ ọrụ. Tinye Google OAuth client IDs na .env gị ma mee app ọhụrụ, ma ọ bụ jiri email na password.
errors.googleRequiresDevBuild: Google sign-in chọrọ development build. Jiri email na password na Expo Go, ma ọ bụ pịa s ka ị gbanwee gaa dev client.
errors.generic: Ihe mehiere mere. Biko nwaa ọzọ.

deleteAccount.title: Hichapụ Akaụnt
deleteAccount.intro: Ihichapụ akaụnt gị bụ nke na-adịgide adịgide ma enweghị ike ịgbanwe ya. Data niile na ohere ịnweta atụmatụ ga-ahapụ. Nyere anyị aka melite site n'ịkọwa ihe kpatara ịhapụ.

reasons.notUsingApp: Anaghị m eji app ahụ ọzọ
reasons.doesntMeetNeeds: App ahụ anaghị eme mkpa m
reasons.switchingService: Ana m agbanwe gaa na ọrụ ọzọ

lastChance.lead: Anyị kwadoro akaụnt gị ma ga-aga n'ihu na nhichapụ.
lastChance.body: Nke a bụ ohere gị ikpeazụ ịkagbuo. Ị gaghị enwe ike ịnweta akaụnt gị azụ mgbe ehichapụchara ma ị ga-achọ imepụta akaụnt ọhụrụ ma ị chọrọ ịlaghachi.
lastChance.question: Ị ji n'aka na ị chọrọ ihichapụ akaụnt gị?

otp.title: Kwado njirimara gị
otp.body: Maka nchekwa, biko tinye koodu nọmba 6 e zigara na {{email}}

deactivated.title: Emeghị ka Akaụnt Rụọ Ọrụ
deactivated.body: Akaụnt AjoLedger gị haziri maka nhichapụ. A ga-ewepụ ya kpamkpam na ụbọchị 14.
deactivated.footer:
Ọ bụrụ na ị gbanwee echiche, banye ọzọ tupu oge ahụ iji megharị akaụnt gị.

Anyị na-atụ anya ịhụ gị ọzọ.

reactivate.title: Emeghị ka akaụnt rụọ ọrụ
reactivate.body: Emeghị ka akaụnt gị rụọ ọrụ. Megharịa ya iji gaa n'ihu na AjoLedger.

confirmation.title: Ezigala Ozi!
confirmation.body: Daalụ maka ịkpọtụrụ anyị. Anyị ga-azaghachi gị na <highlight>{{email}}</highlight> n'ime awa 24.
